# Cybereason Corporate Contributor License Agreement (CCLA)

This Corporate Contributor License Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between the legal entity identified below ("Corporation") and Cybereason Ltd. ("Cybereason").

This Agreement allows Corporation's employees or contractors to contribute to owLSM while ensuring Corporation grants the required rights.

## 1. Definitions

- **Contribution** means any source code, documentation, files, comments, patches, pull requests, or other material intentionally submitted to the owLSM project by a Contributor authorized by Corporation.
- **Project** means the owLSM repository and its related repositories or distributions managed by Cybereason.
- **Contributor** means an individual employee or contractor that Corporation authorizes to submit Contributions.

## 2. Copyright License Grant

Corporation grants Cybereason a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, irrevocable, transferable, sublicensable, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, prepare derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform, distribute, and otherwise exploit Contributions for any purpose, including commercial purposes.

## 3. Patent License Grant

To the extent Corporation has the right to grant them, Corporation grants Cybereason and downstream recipients a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, irrevocable, royalty-free patent license to make, have made, use, offer to sell, sell, import, and otherwise transfer Contributions.

If Corporation initiates patent litigation alleging that the Project or a Contribution infringes a patent, any patent licenses granted by Corporation for the Project under this Agreement terminate as of the date such litigation is filed.

## 4. Authority and Rights

Corporation represents that:

- It has sufficient rights to grant the licenses in this Agreement.
- It will authorize only Contributors who are permitted to submit Contributions on Corporation's behalf.
- Contributions submitted on Corporation's behalf do not knowingly include material that Corporation lacks rights to provide.

## 5. Open Source Project License

Corporation understands that Contributions may be distributed as part of the Project under the Project's open source license (currently GPL-2.0), and may also be used by Cybereason under the broader rights granted in this Agreement.

## 6. No Compensation; No Obligation

Corporation understands and agrees that:

- Neither Corporation nor its Contributors are entitled to compensation, royalties, accounting, or other payment from Cybereason for use of Contributions.
- Cybereason has no obligation to use, publish, maintain, support, or distribute any Contribution.

After execution, provide this signed CCLA to Cybereason legal/compliance contact and keep a copy for records.
